title: Inflation workshop — learner handout visibility probe

content.title: Inflation calculation worksheet

materials.worked_example:
**Step 1:** Identify the base-year price level.
**Step 2:** Compute the percentage change.
materials.M2_sample_output: Facilitator checking: verify learners quote both years before revealing the rate.

limitations: Probe fixture for learner workshop material visibility.
